examples: The horses broke from the stable
Nobody can break out--this prison is high security

meanings.definition: break off (a piece from a whole)

examples: She had broken with the traditional patterns

meanings.definition: withdraw from an organization or communion
examples: After the break up of the Soviet Union, many republics broke away

meanings.definition: flee; take to one's heels; cut and run
examples: If you see this man, run!
The burglars escaped before the police showed up
